purpose: Manages application properties by loading, storing, and providing access to key-value pairs in a properties file located in the user's home directory. Supports default property initialization and type-specific retrieval methods.

return value.description: The Properties object containing key-value pairs

methods.code: public Object get(final String KEY) { return properties.getOrDefault(KEY, ""); }

parameters.name: KEY
parameters.description: The key for which the value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The value associated with the key, or an empty string if the key is not found

parameters.name: VALUE
parameters.description: The value to be associated with the key

methods.code: public String getString(final String key) { return properties.getOrDefault(key, "").toString(); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the string value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The string value associated with the key, or an empty string if the key is not found

methods.code: public double getDouble(final String key) { return Double.parseDouble(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the double value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The double value associated with the key, or 0.0 if the key is not found or parsing fails

methods.code: public float getFloat(final String key) { return Float.parseFloat(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the float value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The float value associated with the key, or 0.0f if the key is not found or parsing fails

methods.code: public int getInt(final String key) { return Integer.parseInt(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the integer value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The integer value associated with the key, or 0 if the key is not found or parsing fails

methods.code: public long getLong(final String key) { return Long.parseLong(properties.getOrDefault(key, "0").toString()); }

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key for which the long value is to be retrieved

return value.description: The long value associated with the key, or 0L if the key is not found or parsing fails

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The Properties object to be initialized with default values
